notes: No external data fetches, real public records, or app-visible generated public data are active.

sources.name: CMS hospital/provider data
sources.expectedUse: Future hospital facility records and selected source-supported attributes.
sources.allowedUse: Planning, orientation, quality improvement, and public-data situational awareness.
sources.notAllowedUse: Live routing, diversion, bed availability, dispatch, triage, transfer decisions, or clinical decision support.
sources.plannedRefreshCadence: To be determined during source-specific ingestion patch.
limitations: No records ingested in v0.2.0.
Future ingestion must validate source fields, dates, and limitations before display.

sources.name: CMS Dialysis Facility Care Compare / Listing by Facility
sources.expectedUse: Public-data planning/context pilot for dialysis facility identity, address, phone, and source-supported facility metadata only.
sources.allowedUse: Planning, orientation, quality improvement, and public-data situational awareness only.
sources.notAllowedUse: Patient referral, dialysis routing, transfer, treatment, appointment availability, station availability, live capacity, staffing status, live diversion, bed availability, dispatch, triage, medical-control guidance, or clinical decision support.
sources.sourceAccessPattern: CMS Provider Data API/datastore or manual CMS public download
sources.plannedRefreshCadence: Manual validation-gated refresh only; no auto-merge.
limitations: Not used in the default StatTerrain map.
Not preview-ready until geocoded and geography-validated in a later patch.
Does not provide emergency receiving capability.
Must not be used for patient referral, routing, treatment, appointment availability, dialysis station availability, live capacity, or clinical decision support.
sources.updateFrequency: CMS public Provider Data Catalog refresh cadence; verify during each refresh from source metadata.
sources.licenseOrUseNotes: Official CMS public Provider Data Catalog source; access/use notes must be checked with CMS source metadata during production use.
sources.ingestionStatus: v0.2.8 fixture-capable pipeline added; real fetch allowed but validation-gated
